beginner/task5_vuln_pcf/7f8e187792e83abb.explanation: Both passages identify the same vulnerability (CORS Misconfiguration), the same root cause (AllowAllOrigins: true and AllowCredentials: true in setCorsHeader), the same impact (CSRF/unauthorized access to policy data), and the same core remediation steps (restricting origins, disabling credentials, and making configuration external).
